ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the tournament is held */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the golf course */,
  "yardage" INTEGER /* Total yardage of the golf course */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country the player represents */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "place" TEXT /* Final position of the player in the tournament */,
  "score" TEXT /* Total score of the player in the tournament */,
  "to_par" TEXT /* Score relative to par */,
  "earnings" REAL /* Earnings of the player in the tournament */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_results_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tournament_results_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score across all tournaments */,
  "best_score" INTEGER /* Best score in any tournament */,
  "worst_score" INTEGER /* Worst score in any tournament */,
  "total_tournaments_played" INTEGER /* Total number of tournaments played */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of tournament wins */,
  "total_top_10_finishes" INTEGER /* Total number of top 10 finishes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country is located on */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "round" INTEGER /* Round number */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score in the round */,
  "to_par" INTEGER /* Score relative to par */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., player, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the tournament data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the tournament data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score in the round */,
  "to_par" INTEGER /* Score relative to par */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rounds_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_rounds_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_handicaps" (
  "handicap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each handicap */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "handicap" INTEGER /* Handicap of the player */,
  "handicap_index" REAL /* Handicap index of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("handicap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_handicaps_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_statistics" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "par" INTEGER /* Par of the course */,
  "yardage" INTEGER /* Total yardage of the course */,
  "slope_rating" REAL /* Slope rating of the course */,
  "course_rating" REAL /* Course rating of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournament_courses" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id", "course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_tournament_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score across all rounds */,
  "best_score" INTEGER /* Best score in any round */,
  "worst_score" INTEGER /* Worst score in any round */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_tournament_statistics_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
column_names: Location where the tournament is held
Total yardage of the golf course
Final position of the player in the tournament
Total score of the player in the tournament
Earnings of the player in the tournament

Role of the user (e.g., player, coach, admin)
